title: Communauté de communes du Pays Hamois
summary: The Communauté de communes du Pays Hamois is a former communauté de communes in the Somme département and in the Picardie région of France. It was created in October 1960. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes de l'Est de la Somme in January 2017.
text:
The Communauté de communes du Pays Hamois is a former communauté de communes in the Somme département and in the Picardie région of France. It was created in October 1960. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes de l'Est de la Somme in January 2017.

Composition
This Communauté de communes comprised 18 communes:
